subcodes.title: Words to a newspaper publisher, spoken on 1912-04-04
subcodes.first_line: I am going to America at the invitation of peace congresses, as the fundamental principles of this Cause are universal peace
subcodes.first_line_orig: من بر حسب دعوتهای محافل صلح بامریکا میروم زیرا اساس این امر بر صلح عمومیست و وحدت عالم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause, @universality of the Cause, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity
